allow: PowerShell($sp = "C:\\Users\\sonmok\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--AI-Godius\\d29f10cd-3b49-4f63-ad40-45568aef0a1c\\scratchpad"; foreach \($u in @\("h_info_1","h_info_2","h_info_3","h_info_4","guide_7?t_id=2","guide_9?t_id=2&cate=1"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \("https://www.godius.co.kr/" + $u\) -UseBasicParsing; $name = \($u -replace '[?&=]','_'\); $r.Content | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$sp\\$name.html"; "$u : $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "$u : FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($sp = "C:\\Users\\sonmok\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--AI-Godius\\d29f10cd-3b49-4f63-ad40-45568aef0a1c\\scratchpad"; foreach \($p in @\(7,11,13,12\)\) { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.godius.co.kr/h_info_1?t_id=2&part=$p" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$sp\\part$p.html"; "part $p : $\($r.Content.Length\)" })

PowerShell($sp = "C:\\Users\\sonmok\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--AI-Godius\\d29f10cd-3b49-4f63-ad40-45568aef0a1c\\scratchpad"; foreach \($p in @\(7,11,13,12\)\) { $html = Get-Content "$sp\\part$p.html" -Raw; $m = [regex]::Matches\($html, 'https://image1\\.godius\\.co\\.kr/[^"]+\\.\(jpg|png|gif\)'\); $i=0; foreach \($mm in $m\) { $url = $mm.Value; if \($url -notmatch '20200121'\) { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile "$sp\\part${p}_img$i.jpg"; "part$p img$i : $url"; $i++ } } })
